events.title: Acquired NSGB → QNB AlAhli (Egypt)
events.effect: Adds the Egypt geography segment; EGP translation exposure from 2013.

events.title: Basel III (QCB)
events.effect: Capital adequacy reported under Basel III; CET1/AT1/Tier-2 split; AT1 instruments (often sukuk) shown in equity.

events.title: Acquired Finansbank → QNB Finansbank (Turkey)
events.effect: Adds Turkey; large book; significant TRY translation effects thereafter.

events.title: IFRS 9 (expected credit losses)
events.effect: Loan-loss provisioning moves to forward-looking ECL with Stage 1/2/3; watch ECL coverage and staging migration.

events.title: IAS 29 hyperinflation (Turkey)
events.effect: Turkish operations reported under hyperinflation accounting from 2022.

accounting_quirks: AT1 capital instruments presented in equity
